arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp 'discussed' replacing Mohamed Salah at Liverpool with Antony
arts.sum: Liverpool could soon be on the lookout for a replacement for Mohamed Salah but ex-Reds boss Jurgen Klopp thought he had the perfect candidate back in 2022

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah on standby for Liverpool first after Jurgen Klopp decision
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah and Jurgen Klopp won everything there was to win with each other, and the former Liverpool boss could still have an impact on their star man despite Arne Slot being in charge

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Arsenal sent £33.4m transfer warning by Frankfurt chief over Omar Marmoush
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt sporting director Markus Krosche warns Liverpool that a fee of €40m (£33.4m) will not be enough to sign Omar Marmoush next year.

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool think £600,000 forward could truly replace Mo Salah if he improves his finishing
arts.sum: The future of Mohamed Salah at Liverpool is wrapped up in uncertainty. The Egypt international will become a free agent at the end of the...

arts.ttl: “I hope…” – Mohamed Salah speaks out on what he wants for Liverpool transfer target
arts.sum: Liverpool star Mohamed Salah has spoken out on his fellow countryman Omar Marmoush after his superb form in the Bundesliga this season with Eintracht Frankfurt. The Egypt international looks like he could be the next big star player of his country, following the immense success of Salah in the last decade or so. Still, Salah […] The post “I hope…” – Mohamed Salah speaks out on what he wants for Liverpool transfer target appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool learn Omar Marmoush price tag as Eintracht Frankfurt rule out cheap sale
arts.sum: Liverpool would have to pay significantly more than market value if they are to launch an approach for Eintracht Frankfurt forward Omar Marmoush, the Bundesliga side have confirmed.

arts.ttl: Chelsea lodge €20m offer for Liverpool's dream Salah replacement
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly eager to beat Liverpool in the race to sign Lyon wonderkid Rayan Cherki next year. As a result, a January fire-sale is expected, and Chelsea and Liverpool are hoping to take advantage of Lyon’s situation by finalising a deal for Cherki.

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Reds teammates in fiery row as baffling Mohamed Salah claim made
arts.sum: Much of Arne Slot's squad are currently on international duty but will soon return as the Reds hope to continue their fine form in the Premier League when they face Southampton

arts.ttl: Preview: Egypt vs. Botswana - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's Africa Cup of Nations Qualifying clash between Egypt and Botswana, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: €40m not enough to prize Marmoush away from Frankfurt, says Krösche
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt boss Markus Krösche has opened up on the rumors surrounding Omar Marmoush, insisting that €40 million is not enough to persuade the club to sell him.
